source_text:
Begin Main

if ( CharGenState != -1 )
	startscript EnableMenus
endif

End Main

Begin EnableMenus

EnableMagicMenu
EnableInventoryMenu
EnableMapMenu
EnableStatsMenu
EnableRest
set CharGenState to -1

stopscript EnableMenus

End EnableMenus

Begin JTT_SurvivalScript

short Hunger
short Warmth
float HungerTimer

Set HungerTimer to ( HungerTimer + GetSecondsPassed )

if ( HungerTimer >= 300 )
    Set HungerTimer to 0
    Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger + 5 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger >= 50 )
        if ( JTT_Hunger < 80 )
            MessageBox "You are growing hungry. Find food before your strength fades."
        endif
    endif
    if ( JTT_Hunger >= 80 )
        MessageBox "You are starving! Your body grows weak. Eat something immediately!"
        ModCurrentHealth -3
    endif
endif

if ( JTT_Hunger >= 100 )
    Set JTT_Hunger to 100
endif

End

Begin JTT_ResourceNode

short Activated
short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This resource node has been depleted."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        Set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood + 1 )
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "You gather resources. Harvests remaining: 2"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "You gather resources. Harvests remaining: 1"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "You gather the last of the resources. This node is depleted."
        endif
    endif
    Activate
endif

End

Begin JTT_PlayerStart

short Initialized

if ( Initialized == 0 )
    Set Initialized to 1
    Set JTT_PlayerInit to 1
    Set JTT_Hunger to 0
    Set JTT_Warmth to 100
    Set JTT_Round to 0
    StartScript JTT_SurvivalScript
    MessageBox "Welcome to Jungle Troll Tribes! Four ancient troll tribes war for dominance of the Jungle Isle. Speak with the Tribal Elder to learn the ways of survival." "Begin"
endif

End

Begin JTT_TribalDrum

short Activated

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( Activated == 0 )
        Set Activated to 1
        PlaySound3D "jtt_drum_beat"
        MessageBox "The tribal drum beats strengthen your spirit! (+15 Strength for 60 seconds)"
    else
        MessageBox "The drum still echoes with power. Wait for the rhythm to fade."
    endif
    Activate
endif

if ( Activated == 1 )
    Set Activated to 0
endif

End
